creator: leeym@civil.ncku.edu.tw
text:
I found the ports of p5-Pg (1.6.1) was marked as broken.
I'm not sure if there're some problems compile p5-Pg on FreeBSD-current,
but I can compile and install it (1.8.1) on FreeBSD 3.2-STABLE.

Fix: 

I made a ports of pgsql_perl5-1.8.1
http://cae.ce.ntu.edu.tw/~leeym/dl/p5-Pg.tar.gz

Is that OK ? It's the first time for me to use "send-pr"  :-)
How-To-Repeat: 
	
broken ports ?! I don't know..
please ask "James FitzGibbon" <jfitz@FreeBSD.ORG>, the maintainer of p5-Pg.
